parityMeta.describes: TrainingDecision V2 severe-rest parity — acutePainReported severity flag forces sessionIntent='severe-rest', riskLevel='severe', AR-1 severe-override + severe-cut, and a conservative volume floor that comes from a REAL severity signal (not stale legacy advice).
parityMeta.sourceNotes: Synthetic AppData built via tests/fixtures.makeAppData. Two recent completed sessions (no gap, so phase stays persisted), neutral todayStatus. The severity comes from decisionMetadata.acutePainReported threaded into the Clean Input Contract.
